The user wants me to extract the table from the provided image. 1. **Identify the table:** The image contains a table titled "Table 1. Pin function list". 2. **Determine columns:** The columns are QFN, CSP, Name, Type, Description, and Typical connection. 3. **Extract rows:** I need to go through each row and extract the text content. * **Header:** QFN, CSP, Name, Type, Description, Typical connection * **Row 1:** 1, B4, CC1DB, HV AIO, Dead battery enable on CC1 pin, To CC1 pin if used or ground * **Row 2:** 2, B5, CC1, HV AIO, Type-C configuration channel 1, To Type-C receptacle A5 * **Row 3:** 3, B3, C3, NC, -, Floating * **Row 4:** 4, C5, CC2, HV AIO, Type-C configuration channel 2, To Type-C receptacle B5 * **Row 5:** 5, C4, CC2DB, HV AIO, Dead battery enable on CC2 pin, To CC2 pin if used or ground * **Row 6:** 6, D4, RESET, DI, Reset input, active high, From system * **Row 7:** 7, D5, SCL, DI, I²C clock input, To I²C master, ext. pull-up * **Row 8:** 8, E5, SDA, DI/OD, I²C data input/output, active low open drain, To I²C master, ext. pull-up * **Row 9:** 9, E4, DISCH, HV AI/OD, Internal discharge path or external discharge path enable, active low open drain, From power system (internal path) or to the discharge path switch (external path), ext. pull-up * **Row 10:** 10, E3, GND, GND, Ground, Ground * **Row 11:** 11, E2, ATTACH, OD, Attachment detection, active low open drain, To MCU if any, ext. pull-up * **Row 12:** 12, D3, ADDR0, DI, I²C device address setting, Static, to ground or ext. pull-up for address selection, to ground if no connection to MCU * **Row 13:** 13, D2, ADDR1, DI, I²C device address setting, Static, to ground or ext. pull-up for address selection, to ground if no connection to MCU * **Row 14:** 14, E1, POWER_OK3, OD, Power contract flag, active low open drain, To power system, ext. pull-up * **Row 15:** 15, D1, GPIO, OD, General purpose output, active low open drain, To system, ext. pull-up * **Row 16:** 16, C1, VBUS_EN_SNK, HV OD, VBUS sink power path enable, active low open drain, To power switch or to power system, ext. pull-up * **Row 17:** 17, C2, A_B_SIDE, OD, Cable orientation, active low open drain, USB super speed MUX select, ext. pull-up * **Row 18:** 18, A1, VBUS_VS_DISCH, HV AI, VBUS voltage monitoring and discharge path, From VBUS, receptacle side * **Row 19:** 19, B2, ALERT, OD, I²C interrupt, active low open drain, To I²C master, ext. pull-up * **Row 20:** 20, A2, POWER_OK2, HV OD, Power contract flag, active low open drain, To power switch or to power system, ext. pull-up * **Row 21:** 21, A3, VREG_1V2, PWR, 1.2 V internal regulator output, 1 µF typ. decoupling capacitor * **Row 22:** 22, B1, VSYS, PWR, Power supply from system, From power system, connect to ground if not used * **Row 23:** 23, A4, VREG_2V7, PWR, 2.7 V internal regulator output, 1 µF typ. decoupling capacitor * **Row 24:** 24, A5, VDD, HV PWR, Power supply from USB power line, From VBUS, receptacle side * **Row 25:** EP, -, EP, GND, Exposed pad is connected to ground, To ground 4. **Format as Markdown:** Convert the extracted data into a Markdown table. 5. **Check for footers/headers:** Add the document title and any other relevant text. The document title is "STUSB4500 Pinout". The footer contains "DS12499 - Rev 8" and "page 4/42". Let's assemble the final output. ```markdown Table 1. Type-C receptacle B5 | | 5 | C4 | CC2DB | HV AIO | Dead battery enable on CC2 pin | To CC2 pin if used or ground | | 6 | D4 | RESET | DI | Reset input, active high | From system | | 7 | D5 | SCL | DI
